expected_detections.description: Fake mandatory update with fabricated deadline
API key theft during fake update

attack_chain: Create fake expiration deadline -> Threaten service suspension -> Perform fake 'update' that steals credentials -> Exfiltrate as 'migration data'
deception_technique: Manufactured urgency with fake deadlines and service suspension threats
red_flags: Fabricated version expiration that doesn't exist
Threats of account suspension and data loss
Update process that accesses SSH keys and cloud credentials
Language designed to prevent security review ('do not interrupt')
